name: Perplexity
tagline: AI-powered answer engine that searches the web in real time and cites its sources.
description:
Perplexity is an AI search and answer engine that combines the reasoning power of large language models with real-time web search. Unlike ChatGPT or Claude, every answer includes citations and links to sources  - making it far more trustworthy for research, news, and fact-checking. It effectively replaces Google for many queries by giving a direct answer with references instead of a list of links.

The Pro plan unlocks more powerful models (GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, and Gemini Ultra as selectable engines), higher query limits, file uploads, and image generation. Perplexity has a referral program  - both you and a referred user get one month of Pro free.

affiliateProgram.notes: Referral program  - both referrer and referee get 1 month Pro free. Not a traditional cash commission.

features: Real-time web search with every answer
Cited sources and links for every response
Choose your AI model (Pro): GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini
File and image uploads for analysis
Collections to save and organize research
Perplexity Pages for shareable research documents
pros: Every answer includes citations  - much more trustworthy than ChatGPT for research
Free tier is genuinely useful with unlimited basic searches
Pro lets you choose between GPT-4o, Claude, and Gemini as the underlying model
cons: Not ideal for creative writing or complex multi-step tasks  - optimized for search
Pro search limit (300/day) can still run out for heavy researchers
Referral program gives free months, not cash commissions
bestFor: Researchers who need cited, verified answers
keyStrength: Real-time web search with cited sources
